loginPrompt: Please log in with your Discord account to view the dashboard.
selectGuild.title: Select a Server
selectGuild.subtitleDashboard: Select a server to view the dashboard
selectGuild.emptyDesc: You need a server where you have administrator or server management permissions.
privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.section1.title: 1. Information We Collect
privacy.section1.intro: DHyunBot (hereinafter "the Bot") collects the following information to provide its services.
privacy.section1.item1: Discord user ID, nickname, and avatar URL
privacy.section1.item3: Voice channel join/leave times, channel ID, and microphone status
privacy.section1.item4: Co-presence records (which members were in the voice channel together)
privacy.section1.item5: Newbie mission progress and Moco hunt records
privacy.section2.title: 2. How We Use Information
privacy.section2.item1: Providing voice channel activity statistics (dashboard visualization)
privacy.section2.item4: Providing newbie management and onboarding features
privacy.section3.title: 3. Third-Party Disclosure
privacy.section3.body1: The Bot transmits voice activity statistics (aggregated data that cannot identify individuals) to the Google Gemini API to provide AI analysis features. The transmitted data does not include Discord user IDs or nicknames — only server-level aggregated activity durations are sent.
privacy.section3.body2: No personal information is shared with any other third parties.
privacy.section4.title: 4. Data Retention and Deletion
privacy.section4.body1: Collected voice activity data is retained for a default of 90 days, and data past the retention period is automatically deleted daily.
privacy.section4.body2: Users may request deletion of their data at any time. After logging in to the dashboard, calling the DELETE /api/users/me/data API will immediately delete all voice activity records for that user.
privacy.section5.title: 5. Cookies
privacy.section5.body: The web dashboard stores a JWT token in an httpOnly cookie for Discord OAuth2 authentication. This cookie expires after 1 hour and is immediately deleted upon logout. No tracking cookies are used.
privacy.section6.title: 6. Data Security
privacy.section6.item1: All API communications are encrypted via HTTPS
privacy.section6.item2: Authentication tokens are protected against tampering with JWT signatures
privacy.section6.item3: Database access is restricted to the server's internal network
privacy.section6.item4: API requests are protected by rate limiting
privacy.section7.title: 7. Contact
privacy.section7.body: For inquiries regarding personal information processing, please contact the administrator of the Discord server where the bot operates.
terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.section1.title: 1. Service Overview
terms.section1.body: DHyunBot (hereinafter "the Service") is a Discord bot and web dashboard that provides voice channel activity tracking, AI-based analysis reports, music playback, newbie management, and inactive member classification for Discord servers.
terms.section2.title: 2. Terms of Use
terms.section2.item1: A Discord account is required to use the Service
terms.section2.item2: Administrator permissions on the target server are required to invite the bot
terms.section2.item3: The web dashboard is accessible only to users with server management permissions (ADMINISTRATOR or MANAGE_GUILD)
terms.section2.item4: You must comply with Discord's Terms of Service and Community Guidelines when using the Service
terms.section3.title: 3. Prohibited Activities
terms.section3.item1: Automated mass requests to the bot or API (scraping, bot attacks, etc.)
terms.section3.item2: Exploiting vulnerabilities in the Service or unauthorized access to other users' data
terms.section3.item3: Using the bot for activities that violate Discord's Terms of Service
terms.section3.item4: Disrupting the normal operation of the Service
terms.section4.title: 4. Service Changes and Termination
terms.section4.body: The operator may change or terminate part or all of the Service without prior notice. The operator is not responsible for data loss due to service interruption.
terms.section5.title: 5. Disclaimer
terms.section5.item1: The Service is provided "AS IS" without warranty of fitness for a particular purpose or stability
terms.section5.item2: The operator is not responsible for service interruptions caused by failures of external services such as Discord API or Google Gemini API
terms.section5.item3: 100% accuracy of voice activity data is not guaranteed (some data may be missed due to network delays, bot restarts, etc.)
terms.section5.item4: The operator does not intervene in disputes between users
terms.section6.title: 6. Changes to Terms
terms.section6.body: These Terms may be updated as needed, and changes will be announced within the Service. If you do not agree to the updated Terms, you may stop using the Service and remove the bot from your server.
terms.section7.title: 7. Contact
terms.section7.body: For inquiries regarding use of the Service, please contact the administrator of the Discord server where the bot operates.
